title: Kimi K3: The First Open Model on the Frontier — Priced Like a Closed One
description: Kimi K3 is the third most intelligent model in the world and the first open-weight model to reach the frontier's top — but at $15/M output and $0.94 per task, it charges frontier prices. What open weights buy in 2026.

title: Claude Fable 5 vs GPT-5.6: The Latest-vs-Latest Flagship Comparison
description: Claude Fable 5 vs GPT-5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna): the true latest-vs-latest flagship comparison. Fable 5 owns coding and trust; GPT-5.6 wins agents, browsing, long context, and price.

title: The Price of Intelligence: Open-Weight vs Paid Frontier Models in 2026
description: Open-weight LLMs now match the paid mid-tier at a fraction of the cost, but the frontier ceiling is still closed-only. A price-versus-intelligence map of DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi and Qwen against Opus, Fable, GPT-5.6 and Grok.

title: GPT-5.6 vs GPT-5.5: The Upgrade That Isn't About Intelligence
description: GPT-5.6's flagship scores a point below GPT-5.5 on raw intelligence. The real upgrade is structural: three tiers, a price ladder, better agentic behaviour at the same cost, and one nasty long-context trap.

title: Rebuilding the LLM Inference Stack From Scratch in NumPy
description: A trainable GPT, KV-cache, RoPE, paged attention, speculative decoding, and continuous batching — rebuilt from scratch in pure NumPy, with every optimization proven correct.

title: Your Personal AI Lab on Your Laptop, Remotely Accessible for Free
description: Run AI assistants, coding agents, and personal projects on your laptop — and access them from your phone anywhere, for free, using Tailscale and open-source tools.

title: Automating Blog Posting on Medium Using AI Agents and OpenClaw
description: How to automate blog posting on Medium using AI agents and OpenClaw — a complete setup guide with GitHub Pages and personal assistant workflows.

title: vLLM Model Chooser: Will This LLM Actually Fit on Your GPUs?
description: An interactive tool that answers "will this LLM actually fit on my GPUs?" - weights, KV cache from real attention geometry, and quantization support, for 108 models from L4 to B200.

title: Example Post: Every Supported Element
description: A fully annotated example post showing every supported HTML element — the reference for agents generating new posts.
